channel.title: Combined Politepol Feed
channel.description: Merged feed from multiple Politepol sources

item.title: Sixteen India-bound ships loaded with fertilisers stuck in Hormuz strait govt, says
item.description: Sixteen India-bound ships carrying fertiliser are stranded ​in the Strait of Hormuz, ‌said Bandana Preyashi, a joint secretary in the fertilisers ministry. Eight ships carrying 330,00 ​metric tonnes of urea, four ships ​loaded with 257,000 tonnes of di-ammonium ⁠phosphate, one vessel with amm Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Ukraine’s Zelenskiy says he offered to meet Putin at G7
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy said on Monday that he had offered to meet Vladimir Putin at a G7 summit in France this week for ​talks to end a four-year war, but the Russian leader was ‌not ready to speak. Zelenskiy, speaking at a historic monastery in Kyiv that was damaged in an ov Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Turkey's foreign minister to visit Moscow for talks on Ukraine, Black Sea
item.description: Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan will repeat Turkey's offer to host talks between Russia and Ukraine on ​a visit to Moscow this week at which ‌he will also discuss Black Sea shipping safety and the South Caucasus, a diplomatic source said on Monday. The visit on Tuesday ​and Wednesday comes ahead Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Twelve killed in Missouri plane crash
item.description: Eleven skydivers and a pilot died in the crash of a private plane on Sunday ​in Butler, Missouri, aircraft operator Skydive Kansas City said. The Missouri State Highway Patrol said ‌the crash occurred near the Butler Memorial Airport, about 60 miles (100 km) south of Kansas City, Missouri. " Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Trump's $100,000 H-1B visa fee is unlawful, US judge rules
Trump appoints ally and FHFA chief Pulte as acting US intelligence director
Rubio to testify before Congress for the first time since the start of the Iran war
11 confirmed dead in Washington state chemical accident
Trump to headline 250th anniversary fair opening after performers drop out
Pentagon chief sounds 'alarm' over China's buildup, urges allies to boost defence spend
Suspect killed during shooting near White House
New York Times sues Pentagon again over media access restrictions
Mexico denies CNN report on deadly CIA operations against cartels
Trump administration says its war in Iran has been ‘terminated’ before 60-day deadline
Trump lifts tariffs on UK whisky to toast departing King Charles
Prosecution of ex-FBI chief Comey over seashell post is flawed, experts say
